validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic review-preflight validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, private packet, raw account, operator, credential, provider payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: future review requires an explicit owner-supplied validation result receipt path
future review must validate the receipt with the local receipt validator before any import review
future review cannot record the private packet path or raw packet values
future review success still does not import permission evidence or enable provider calls, order adapter implementation, runtime routes, UI, DB writes, orders, or live trading
